member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.BackgroundServices.HealthMonitorService
member.summary: Background service that runs periodic health checks every 30 seconds

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.BackgroundServices.MetricsCollectionService
member.summary: Background service that collects queue depth and throughput metrics every minute

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.BackgroundServices.MetricsCollectionService.GetQueueMetrics(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the recent metrics for a specific queue

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.BackgroundServices.MetricsCollectionService.GetThroughputMetrics(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the recent throughput metrics

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.BackgroundServices.QueueMetricSnapshot
member.summary: Snapshot of queue metrics at a point in time

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.BackgroundServices.ThroughputMetric
member.summary: Throughput metric calculated between collection intervals

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController
member.summary: API endpoints for conversation tracking and tracing

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.GetConversations(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: List conversations with optional filtering by state
member.param: Filter by conversation state (e.g., CO, SO, ER)

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.GetStatistics
member.summary: Get statistics about conversations

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.GetConversationDetail(System.Guid,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get full conversation trace including timeline

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.GetConversationTrace(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get conversation trace items

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.GetConversationTimeline(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get conversation timeline for visualization

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.ExportConversation(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Export conversation in specified format

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ConversationsController.EndConversation(System.Guid,System.Boolean)
member.summary: End a conversation

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ConversationListResponse
member.summary: Response containing conversations with statistics

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController
member.summary: API endpoints for diagnostics, health checks, and performance metrics

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.GetStatus
member.summary: Get overall Service Broker health status

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.GetBrokerStatus
member.summary: Get Service Broker health information

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.GetTransmissionQueue(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: View transmission queue items
member.param: Minimum seconds a message must be stuck to be included

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.GetDialogErrors(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: View dialog errors
member.param: Include all error states, not just critical
Minimum age in seconds for errors to include

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.GetMetrics(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get performance metrics
member.param: Number of hours to look back (default: 24)
Aggregation interval in minutes (0 = raw data)
Maximum number of metrics to return

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.RunHealthCheck
member.summary: Run a full diagnostic health check

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.GetOrphanedConversations(System.Int32)
member.summary: Check for orphaned conversations
member.param: Threshold in hours to consider a conversation orphaned

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.ValidateServices
member.summary: Validate that all services have valid queues

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DiagnosticsController.GetDiagnosticsSummary
member.summary: Get a full diagnostic summary for reporting

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.TransmissionQueueResponse
member.summary: Response containing transmission queue data

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.DialogErrorsResponse
member.summary: Response containing dialog errors

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.MetricsResponse
member.summary: Response containing performance metrics

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ServiceValidationResponse
member.summary: Response containing service validation results

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.HealthController
member.summary: Health check API endpoints

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.HealthController.GetHealthCheck
member.summary: Run comprehensive health check on Service Broker infrastructure
member.returns: Health check result with broker status, queue health, and overall summary

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.HealthController.Ping
member.summary: Simple ping endpoint to verify API is running

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.MessagesController
member.summary: API endpoints for message operations

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.GetMessageDetails(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Get details of a specific message by conversation handle
member.param: Optional queue name to search in

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.SendMessage(MessageBus.Api.Services.Interfaces.SendMessageRequest)
member.summary: Send a message via Service Broker

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.SendBulkMessages(MessageBus.Api.Controllers.BulkSendRequest)
member.summary: Send multiple messages for testing purposes
member.returns: Bulk send result with success/failure counts

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.ValidateMessageType(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validate that a message type exists for a contract

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.MessagesController.ValidateService(System.String)
member.summary: Validate that a service exists

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.BulkSendRequest
member.summary: Request for bulk message sending

member.name: P:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.BulkSendRequest.Message
member.summary: The message template to send

member.name: P:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.BulkSendRequest.Count
member.summary: Number of messages to send (1-1000)

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.PoisonMessagesController
member.summary: API endpoints for poison message and dead-letter queue management

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.PoisonMessagesController.GetPoisonMessages
member.summary: List all poison messages

member.summary: List dead-lettered messages

member.summary: Get poison message statistics

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.PoisonMessagesController.RetryPoisonMessage(System.Int64)
member.summary: Retry a poison message

member.summary: Purge a poison message to dead-letter queue

member.summary: Bulk retry multiple poison messages

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.PoisonMessagesController.BulkPurge(MessageBus.Api.Controllers.BulkPurgeRequest)
member.summary: Bulk purge multiple poison messages to dead-letter queue
member.param: Bulk purge request with IDs and reason

member.summary: Resolve a dead-letter message (mark as handled)

member.summary: Response containing poison messages with statistics

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.PurgeRequest
member.summary: Request for purging a poison message

member.summary: Request for bulk retry operation

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.BulkPurgeRequest
member.summary: Request for bulk purge operation

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.ResolveRequest
member.summary: Request for resolving a dead-letter message

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.QueuesController
member.summary: API endpoints for queue management operations

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.QueuesController.GetQueues(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: List all queues with statistics
member.param: Include queues with no messages (default: true)

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.QueuesController.GetQueueDetails(System.String)
member.summary: Get detailed statistics for a specific queue
member.returns: Queue statistics including message counts, ages, and health status

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.QueuesController.GetQueueHealth(System.String)
member.summary: Get the health status for a specific queue
member.returns: Queue health status with issues if any

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.QueuesController.GetMessages(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get messages from a queue (non-destructive peek)
member.param: Number of messages per page (default: 25, max: 100)

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.QueuesController.PauseQueue(System.String)
member.summary: Pause a queue (disable receive)
member.param: Name of the queue to pause

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.QueuesController.ResumeQueue(System.String)
member.summary: Resume a paused queue (enable receive)
member.param: Name of the queue to resume

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.QueuesController.PurgeQueue(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Purge all messages from a queue
member.param: Name of the queue to purge
Confirmation flag (must be true to execute)

member.name: T:MessageBus.Api.Controllers.MessageListResponse
member.summary: Response wrapper for paginated message list

member.summary: List all message types defined in the database

member.summary: Get a summary of all services with their queues and message counts

member.summary: Detailed service response including queue info

member.summary: Summary of a service with queue status

member.summary: DbContext for Service Broker Message Bus database operations. Uses keyless entities for stored procedure result sets.

member.summary: Subscribe to a specific queue's updates
member.param: Name of the queue to subscribe to

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Hubs.MessageBusHub.UnsubscribeFromQueue(System.String)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from a specific queue's updates
member.param: Name of the queue to unsubscribe from

member.summary: Subscribe to dashboard updates (health, metrics, alerts)

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Hubs.MessageBusHub.UnsubscribeFromDashboard
member.summary: Unsubscribe from dashboard updates

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Hubs.MessageBusHub.SubscribeToAlerts
member.summary: Subscribe to alert notifications

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Hubs.MessageBusHub.UnsubscribeFromAlerts
member.summary: Unsubscribe from alert notifications

member.summary: Subscribe to conversation updates
member.param: The conversation handle to subscribe to

member.name: M:MessageBus.Api.Hubs.MessageBusHub.UnsubscribeFromConversation(System.Guid)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from conversation updates
member.param: The conversation handle to unsubscribe from

member.summary: Get current connection status

member.summary: Extension methods for sending SignalR messages from services

member.summary: Send queue statistics update to subscribed clients

member.summary: Represents active conversation information from vw_ActiveConversations view

member.summary: Represents a conversation trace item from usp_GetConversationTrace stored procedure

member.summary: Represents a message from the DeadLetterQueue table

member.summary: Represents dialog error information from usp_GetDialogErrors stored procedure

member.summary: Represents the overall health check result from usp_RunHealthCheck stored procedure

member.summary: Represents message information from usp_PeekMessages stored procedure

member.summary: Represents message type information from sys.service_message_types query

member.summary: Represents performance metrics from usp_GetPerformanceMetrics stored procedure
